sentences.arabic: «إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْوَحْيِ، رَقْمُ ١].
sentences.translation: „Djela se vrednuju prema namjerama i svakom čovjeku pripada ono što je namjerio“ [Buhari, Knjiga o početku objave, br. 1].
sentences.translationEn: “Actions are but by intentions, and every man shall have only that which he intended” [Bukhari, Book of Revelation, No. 1].

sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ هَذَا الْحَدِيثُ أَصْلًا عَظِيمًا مِنْ أُصُولِ الدِّينِ، حَيْثُ يُؤَكِّدُ الْعُلَمَاءُ أَنَّ صَلَاحَ الْقَلْبِ يَبْدَأُ بِتَصْحِيحِ الْقَصْدِ لِلَّهِ وَحْدَهُ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj hadis se smatra jednim od velikih temelja vjere, jer učenjaci naglašavaju da ispravnost srca počinje popravljanjem namjere isključivo radi Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: This hadith is considered a great foundation of the religion, as scholars emphasize that the righteousness of the heart begins with correcting one's intention for Allah alone.

sentences.arabic: ذَكَرَ ابْنُ الْقَيِّمِ أَنَّ النِّيَّةَ هِيَ رُوحُ الْعَمَلِ وَلُبُّهُ، وَبِدُونِهَا يَكُونُ الْعَمَلُ كَجَسَدٍ بِلَا رُوحٍ.
sentences.translation: Ibn al-Qayyim je spomenuo da je namjera duh i srž djela, a bez nje je djelo poput tijela bez duše.
sentences.translationEn: Ibn al-Qayyim mentioned that intention is the spirit and core of an action, and without it, the action is like a body without a soul.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يُرَاقِبَ قَلْبَهُ فِي كُلِّ طَاعَةٍ، فَلَا يَطْلُبَ ثَنَاءَ النَّاسِ أَوْ مَصَالِحَ الدُّنْيَا الزَّائِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman mora paziti na svoje srce u svakom pokornom činu, ne tražeći pohvale ljudi niti prolazne dunjalučke interese.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim must monitor his heart in every act of obedience, seeking neither the praise of people nor fleeting worldly interests.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْإِخْلَاصَ لَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ كَلِمَةٍ، بَلْ هُوَ جِهَادٌ مُسْتَمِرٌّ لِدَفْعِ الرِّيَاءِ وَالْعُجْبِ.
sentences.translation: Iskrenost (ihlas) nije samo riječ, već neprestana borba protiv pretvaranja i samodopadnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Sincerity (Ikhlas) is not just a word, but a continuous struggle to repel ostentation and vanity.

sentences.arabic: فَمَنْ صَدَقَ مَعَ اللَّهِ، وَفَّقَهُ اللَّهُ لِلثَّبَاتِ وَالْقَبُولِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ko bude iskren prema Allahu, Allah će mu podariti postojanost i primiti mu djela na ovom i onom svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: Whoever is truthful with Allah, Allah will grant him steadfastness and acceptance in this world and the Hereafter.
